mapper.select: select activity_id, activity_name, discount_id, group_type, take_limit_count, target, valid_time, status, start_time, end_time, tag_id, tag_scope from group_buy_activity where source = #{source} and channel = #{channel} order by id desc limit 1

select activity_id, activity_name, discount_id, group_type, take_limit_count, target, valid_time, status, start_time, end_time, tag_id, tag_scope from group_buy_activity where activity_id = #{activityId} and status = 1

select activity_id, activity_name, discount_id, group_type, take_limit_count, target, valid_time, status, start_time, end_time, tag_id, tag_scope from group_buy_activity where activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.insert: insert into group_buy_activity( activity_id, activity_name, discount_id, group_type, take_limit_count, target, valid_time, status, start_time, end_time, tag_id, tag_scope, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{activityId}, #{activityName}, #{discountId}, #{groupType}, #{takeLimitCount}, #{target}, #{validTime}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{tagId}, #{tagScope}, now(), now() )
mapper.select: select status from group_buy_activity where activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.update: update group_buy_activity set activity_name = #{activityName}, update_time = now() where activity_id = #{activityId}

update group_buy_activity set activity_name = #{activityName}, discount_id = #{discountId}, group_type = #{groupType}, take_limit_count = #{takeLimitCount}, target = #{target}, valid_time = #{validTime}, status = #{status}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, tag_id = #{tagId}, tag_scope = #{tagScope}, update_time = now() where activity_id = #{activityId}
